weather.forecast: Overcast skies with highs in the low to middle 50s. Increasing cloud cover throughout the day.
weather.details: The overcast skies will continue through Saturday. Highs will cool into the low to middle 50s from La Conner to Eatonville thanks to the increasing overcast blanket. Sunday brings a punchy front with chilly lowland rain and breezy snow showers to the high country.

top_stories.headline: 'No Kings' Protests Across Seattle and Western Washington
top_stories.summary: Organizers expect over 100,000 people to attend the No Kings rally at Cal Anderson Park, followed by a march to Seattle Center. This is the third major national day of action in the No Kings movement, with over 3,000 nonviolent protests expected nationwide. In Seattle, the rally starts at noon with a march at 1:15 p.m. Washington Attorney General Nick Brown is expected to speak.

top_stories.headline: Seattle Mariners 2026 Season Underway
top_stories.summary: The Seattle Mariners opened their 2026 season on March 26 against the Cleveland Guardians. Fans packed T-Mobile Park for the home opener. The season marks the 50th in franchise history and 27th full season at T-Mobile Park.

top_stories.headline: West Seattle Stabbing Investigation
top_stories.summary: Police are searching for a stabbing suspect near an alley behind apartments at 35th SW and SW Avalon. The victim, a man in his mid-30s, was stabbed in the stomach and transported to Harborview Medical Center. The suspect is described as a white man in his 50s wearing black and white clothing.
top_stories.location: 35th SW and SW Avalon, West Seattle

top_stories.headline: Orca Sightings in Puget Sound
top_stories.summary: Orcas were sighted in the Seattle-Bainbridge ferry lane vicinity off Eagle Harbor, trending south. Whale watchers reported sightings throughout the morning.

top_stories.headline: Skagit Valley Tulip Festival Kicks Off Early
top_stories.summary: The Skagit Valley Tulip Festival is starting early this year due to a mild winter that prompted early blooms. The overcast Saturday weather may be ideal for visiting the colorful tulip fields.

community_events.details: California Street blocked from SW Alaska to SW Oregon. West Seattle Resist and Singing Resistance participating.

traffic_transit.details: Months-long detour of buses off SW Barton south of Westwood Village has begun. Buses now running on SW Trenton east of 35th.
